satoru was never really noticed, only known for his perfect grades and nerdy interests, other than that he was a complete nobody - and you were one of the most popular girls in the school, which satoru has the fattest crush on ever since you stuck up for him once, but he never thought you felt the same. until you asked him to tutor you, and he eagerly agreed - but those study sessions quickly became more than just learning different math formulas - making out, wandering hands.. and yup, you had the poor boy wrapped around your finger. only one problem - you're already dating the star quarterback, toji fushiguro.
